text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I drop by the cafeteria to find Manhattan Cafe
and Yukino Bijin hanging out together.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh, Cafe's trainer! Well, hey there.
choice_data_list: Hello. What are you two doing?
Hello. What are you two doing?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm about to put a drink together for
Yukino...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yukino was in her room reading a magazine
special on cafes... and she really liked the look of
one of the featured beverages...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't stop wond'rin about the taste, and then
Cafe went and asked if I wanted to try one!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
None of the recipes seemed beyond my abilities,
so...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's amaz'n how you can whip up all these fancy
drinks! You're a real city girl!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...My drinks won't taste quite as nice as the real
thing, but I figured you'd still enjoy the
atmosphere.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So... what would you like to drink, Yukino?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well, about that... Every one of 'em looks so
snazzy I can't decide which cup of jitt'r juice I
fancy!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
This one... Nope, that one! Shucks, there's so
many...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Cafe's trainer, which one would you
pick?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I got no idea which one to plump for, see... And
I'd really appreciate your input!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Boy, that sounds awful adult-like... but it also
sounds like just the kinda joe I'd like to try!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep the general concept, but make
something Yukino can manage...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Here you are. A hot butter au lait.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wow... It smells sweet'r than a honeycomb! You're tell'n me this is coffee?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It is. That's the cinnamon you're smelling. It
complements the richness of the butter. Let the
aroma permeate your body...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, this is downright delicious! It's got me all
warmed up and feeling chirky!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Thank you kindly, Cafe! I'll remember this taste
for as long as I live!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You're definitely exaggerating, but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If you ever want another, feel free to ask.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It makes me happy too, seeing you take an
interest in coffee...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense a warmth in Manhattan Cafe's gentle smile
that rivals that of the hot butter au lait.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Well hey, that sounds like something I could sip
on! Cafe, think you could do that for me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Of course. If you'd prefer something light and
refreshing, I have an idea...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Here you are. A citrus iced coffee tonic.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wait, this is s'posed to be coffee?!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Look at all these bubbles, and there's even a lil'
orange float'n inside... This looks like some fancy
juice!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
At a glance, it does look like a soda... but it is
coffee, just with my twist on it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I mixed in some tonic water and added some
orange flavor... So the taste will be as crisp and
refreshing as the summer sky.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, boy, this is scrumptious! And it's smooth'r
than smooth!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, it's sweet, but it's bitt'r at the same
time... Gee whiz, what a mature flavor!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I'm sure grateful for this bev'rage, Cafe!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I got a real taste of what it's like
to be a hip 'n hopp'n city girl!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. I'm glad you feel that way. Feel free to
ask if you ever want some more.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
After all, it makes me happy too, seeing you take
an interest in coffee...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense a kindness in Manhattan Cafe's gentle
smile as refreshing as the taste of citrus.
